summary: 0.6.34 backs out the 0.6.33 collider-suppression experiment after operator testing showed it only restored visible pointers without actually unlocking grab-nav.
operatorSignals: The only visible effect of 0.6.33 was that the pointers or lasers appeared when button 5 was pressed.
That did not actually unlock grab-nav, so the added complexity was not buying the right result.
actionsTaken: Removed the temporary hosted interaction-collider suppression path.
Removed the helper that resolved hosted interaction colliders for that path.
Returned the live lane to the simpler 0.6.32 behavior.
nonGoals: No further VaM-global UI-hit or worldUI manipulation was added.
No A-B or transport policy changes.
